metaTitle: Slot Machine Repair & Maintenance Service — Nationwide Parts
metaDescription: Slot machine repair, diagnostic, and parts sourcing service. IGT, Bally, Aristocrat, WMS, Konami factory-trained technicians. Ship us your machine or get a phone diagnosis.
title: Broken slot machine? We've probably seen it.
subtitle: 33+ years of slot machine repair. If you bought it from us, support is free forever. If you didn't, we'll still help.

sections.heading: Services we offer
bullets: Full diagnostic and repair (ship-in or mail-in)
Replacement parts sourcing (main boards, power supplies, validators, printers, displays)

sections.heading: How it works
paragraphs: Call or email our service team (contact info in Site Settings) with a description of the issue and, ideally, a short video of the symptom. We'll diagnose over the phone in most cases. If a physical repair is needed, we'll coordinate inbound freight (at your cost) and provide a firm bench estimate before any work begins.

sections.heading: Parts
paragraphs: We maintain one of the deepest inventories of legacy slot machine parts in North America — IGT S2000, Bally S9000/Alpha, WMS Bluebird, Konami Podium, Aristocrat MK6, and more. If we don't have it in stock, we know who does.

sections.heading: Platforms we service
bullets: IGT — S+, S2000, Game King, AVP, G20, Axxis
Bally — S6000, S9000, V32, V22, Alpha, Alpha 2, Pro V32
Aristocrat — MK5, MK6, Viridian, Helix, Arc Single / Arc Double
WMS — Bluebird, Bluebird 2, Gamefield XD, BB3
